name: Gaius's Helm
description:
The black iron helm of Commander Gaius.
Part of an armor set patterned after fallen seeds.

Gaius was the most senior disciple of the same Alabaster Lord
who taught Radahn and Gaea gravitational technique.
shortDescription: The black iron helm of Commander Gaius.

name: Oathseeker Knight Helm
description: An Oathseeker Knight helm. Black with gold ornamentation. These knights set off on quests of discovery, hoping to find by themselves an oath of their own choosing to serve in perfect, lifelong devotion.
shortDescription: An Oathseeker Knight helm. Black with gold ornamentation.

name: Verdigris Helm
description: Helm made from an unusual metal known as verdigris. Verdigris is said to be the gift of an outer god.
shortDescription: Helm made from an unusual metal known as verdigris.

name: Pelt of Ralva
description:
The pelt of Ralva the Great Red Bear,
worn upon the head without modification.

Enhances incantations of what is jokingly called "Bear Communion."

This untreated hide,
won at the end of a bloody bout,
is just the thing to make a wild bear out of a warrior.
shortDescription: The pelt of Ralva the Great Red Bear.

name: Fang Helm
description: Helm of Red Bear, whose name is lost to madness. The cheek guards are shaped after lion fangs. Perhaps his fascination with the untamed strength of the wild stemmed from his past as a Redmane.
shortDescription: Helm of Red Bear, whose name is lost to madness.

name: Gaius's Armor
description:
The black iron chest armor of Commander Gaius. Part of an armor set patterned after fallen seeds.

Gaius was the most senior disciple of the same Alabaster Lord who taught Radahn and Gaea gravitational technique.
shortDescription: The black iron chest armor of Commander Gaius.

name: Oathseeker Knight Armor
description: Oathseeker Knight chest armor. Black with gold ornamentation. These knights set off on quests of discovery, hoping to find by themselves an oath of their own choosing to serve in perfect, lifelong devotion.
shortDescription: Oathseeker Knight chest armor. Black with gold ornamentation.

name: Verdigris Armor
description: Chest armor made from an unusual metal known as verdigris. Verdigris is said to be the gift of an outer god. Possessed of an enormously hefty yet supple strength thanks to its rusted nature.
shortDescription: Chest armor made from an unusual metal known as verdigris.

name: Iron Rivet Armor
description:
Chest armor of Red Bear, whose name is lost to madness.
A vest reinforced with iron rivets.

After killing the great red bear in a blood-soaked bout,
he became fascinated by the untainted glory of its naked strength.

"I wish to be a bear, no more, and no less."
shortDescription: Chest armor of Red Bear, whose name is lost to madness.

name: Finger Robe
description: Robe of Count Ymir, High Priest. The front is open, exposing the squirming fingers beneath. This robe is the image of his fervent desire having broken free, laying bare his greatest wish, and wearing it enhances finger sorceries. "I will be the true mother. My fingers will grant us redemption!"
shortDescription: Robe of Count Ymir, High Priest.

name: Rakshasa Gauntlets
description:
Gauntlets of Rakshasa, soaked in the spurting blood of her victims. Tatters of ragged cloth jut out haphazardly, as if her lust for carnage threatens to break free.

Increases damage dealt to foes, but greatly increases damage taken by the wearer.

Cut down and devour. Only those who repeat the cycle without rest can truly subvert the self and become Rakshasa.
shortDescription: Gauntlets of Rakshasa, soaked in the spurting blood of her victims.

name: Rellana's Gloves
description: Gloves of Rellana, the Twin Moon Knight, fashioned from quality leather.
shortDescription: Gloves of Rellana, the Twin Moon Knight.

name: Astrologer Gloves
description:
Gloves fashioned from fine, supple cloth.
Worn by those who look to the cosmos above.
They read fate in the stars, and are said to be heirs of the glintstone sorcerers.
But alas, the night sky no longer cradles fate.
shortDescription: Gloves fashioned from fine, supple cloth.

name: High Priest Gloves
description: Gloves of Count Ymir, High Priest. Soft and well-tailored.
shortDescription: Gloves of Count Ymir, High Priest.

name: Verdigris Gauntlets
description: Gauntlets made from an unusual metal known as verdigris. Verdigris is said to be the gift of an outer god. Possessed of an enormously hefty yet supple strength thanks to its rusted nature.
shortDescription: Gauntlets made from an unusual metal known as verdigris.

name: Soiled Loincloth
description: This lightly soiled loincloth of ragged cloth does little more than conceal one's nether regions.
shortDescription: Lightly soiled loincloth of ragged cloth

name: Bandit Boots
description:
Leather boots worn by bandits.

Light for ease of movement, and supple for masking sound. In this trade, they offer little damage negation.
shortDescription: Leather boots worn by bandits.

name: Briar Greaves
description:
Battered iron greaves from a foreign land.
Worn by Elemer of the Briar. 

The winding, rusted iron briars are a mark of the guilty, and typically indicate a sentence of death. They also cause this armor to deal damage when performing dodge rolls.

Elemer murdered numerous instructors and merchants, and was known as the Bell Bearing Hunter.
shortDescription: Battered iron greaves from a foreign land. Worn by Elemer of the Briar.

name: Champion Gaiters
description:
Gaiters formed only with leather straps.
Common wear in the badlands.
shortDescription: Gaiters formed only with leather straps.

name: Page Trousers
description:
Trousers worn by pages who serve nobility and are mindful to keep them out of harm's way. 

Traveling wear tailored with exquisite precision, to avoid any undue shame for the page's master.
shortDescription: Trousers worn by pages who serve nobility and are mindful to keep them out of harm's way.
